content.text: A docs-maker is a genuinely new standing role, so spawning is correct here. A teammate is long-lived, so I spawn it on opus — a sonnet mate would auto-compact mid-task and lose its context.

input.name: docs-maker
input.prompt: You own BLUEPRINT + README sync. Claim docs units from the shared task list, work each in your own worktree, mark complete via TaskUpdate, and stay on the roster.

content.content: Teammate docs-maker spawned on opus and joined team teatree-burst.
